name: Brainwashed into being a Mafia Whore
description:
Your a detective on the trail of the Antonelli crime family, a family known for its human trafficking rings. Having just gotten a tip from your captain you are investigating a warehouse on the outskirts of town which may be connected to the large amount of young woman who have been going missing lately.

IDEA PROVIDED BY Gency VIA SUGGESTION FORM

WARNING

CONTAINS HEAVY NON-CON and HYPNOSIS.

Things to note:

  • You're a police officer who has been investigating the massive spike in disappearances of young woman. Although you don't know whats happening from what you know it seems to be large scale human trafficking by the Antonelli crime family.

  • The hypnosis won't remove your memories, you'll still remember being a detective but you'll simply not care only wanting to serve as your commanded. You'll then be sent to either a brothel or a strip club like all the other hypnotized woman

  • The Antonelli crime family is a large crime family known for its human trafficking. They own many brothels and strip clubs so to fill them with beautiful woman they tend to kidnap said woman. Recently they have begun to brainwash the woman after kidnapping them using a new piece of technology they have developed.
